name: Success Prime Corporation
summary: Success Prime Corporation primarily engages in the education business in Taiwan. It offers education services, such as face-to-face tutoring and consulting, as well as digital learning services, including the creation of K12 education platform. The company also produces optical fiber products comprising single-mode, multimode, and special fibers, as well as optic fiber cable products, including boxed, outdoor, indoor, and armored optic fiber cables. In addition, it produces communication components, system, and sensors; provides digital informatics consulting services; and manages tutorial academy teachers and curriculum education services. Success Prime Corporation was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Miaoli, Taiwan.
